title: Booking Data Persists After Save (Draft Round-Trip)

D1_save_success.action: Clicked Save button on booking details page

assertions.expected: Booking details page loads; guest name displays
assertions.actual: Page loaded in 1.2s; guest name field shows current value

assertions.step: Edit guest name: John Doe → Jane Smith
assertions.expected: Form field accepts input; no validation error
assertions.actual: Field edited; no validation errors; Save button enabled

assertions.step: Click Save and wait for success signal
assertions.expected: Toast or badge indicates save succeeded; no 4xx/5xx response
Page reloads from server; no client-side cache
assertions.actual: Full page reload completed; networkidle event triggered

assertions.step: Assert guest name field = Jane Smith (verify persisted)
assertions.expected: After reload, field shows edited value (Jane Smith)
assertions.actual: Guest name field displays: Jane Smith ✓
Network HAR confirms PUT /api/v1/booking returned 200 OK

notes: File coverage: src/components/BookingDetails.tsx:78-95. Document Lifecycle Gates D1-D2 verified. Data persisted through save and hard-reload.
